subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-21 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The people prostrated themselves before the stones whereon the apostles had been seated, and this proceedeth from their connection with God and from the potency of their enduring reality, such that even their mere act of sitting upon a stone hath produced such an effect [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مردم بر سنگهائی که حواریین برآن  نشسته بودند سجده می کردند و این از اثر نسبت الی الله و از قوهٴ بقای حقیقت آنها است که حتی جلوسشان بر سنگ این تأثیر را دارد
subcodes.subjects: @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @power of faith; power of the spirit
